# Gesture Controlled Ball Sort Puzzle

A Ball Sort Puzzle game controlled using hand gestures.

## Features

- Ball Sort Puzzle
- OpenCV Webcam
- MediaPipe Hand Tracking
- Pinch Gesture Detection
- Multiple Levels
- Win Detection
- Restart Option
- Mouse Support
- Gesture Support

## Technologies

- Python
- OpenCV
- MediaPipe
- Pygame
- NumPy

## Installation

```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

## Run

```bash
python main.py
```

## Controls

### Mouse

Click one tube.

Click another tube.

### Gesture

Move hand over tube.

Pinch fingers to pick.

Move to another tube.

Pinch again to drop.

## Project Structure

```
GestureBallSort/

main.py
game.py
ball.py
tube.py
camera.py
hand.py
gesture.py
ui.py
animation.py
levels.py
constants.py
requirements.txt
README.md
```
